title: Harden kill-switch engagement, disarm and denial proofs
goal: Remove the leftover T030 production test marker safely, make the canonical marker impossible to mutate through generic trusted-owner surfaces, add a narrow recovery-gated disarm operation, and replace production-state denial proofs with isolated deployed-artifact probes.

acceptance.assertion: The exact marker SHA-256 1a66d92ea0d5ec2ef463545bf58a181eaca5f7955c3d502dc48810bca8f674f3 is moved reversibly out of the canonical path by an external hash-bound helper; marker absence, quarantine identity, audit validity, recovery readiness and operator health are read back.
KILL_SWITCH_PATH is rejected by generic create, replace, remove, destroy, terminal and indirect execution surfaces regardless of trusted_owner; tests prove no other protected-path contract regresses.
A dedicated engage operation creates only a schema-valid regular single-link 0600 marker with bounded reason and evidence identity, using create-only semantics and an audit receipt.

A dedicated disarm operation is the only in-band exception: it requires exact marker SHA-256, environment switch off, valid audit chain, valid deployed provenance, fresh canonical recovery readiness, safe marker identity, reversible quarantine, fsync and absence readback.

All ordinary mutations remain denied while the marker is active; wrong hash, symlink, hardlink, broad mode, malformed marker, environment kill switch, invalid audit, stale recovery or deployment drift deny disarm before mutation.

The deployed artifact is exercised in a transient isolated HOME/STATE_DIR for kill-switch denial proof. The probe refuses the canonical production path and leaves it byte-for-byte unchanged on success, exception and signal cleanup paths.
Focused tests and full validation pass; the complete current GitHub diff is exported as a downloadable SHA-256-bound artifact; diff-bound critical self-review passes before merge.

After merge, the immutable runtime is deployed and provenance-valid; live checks prove normal mutation works with no marker, typed engagement blocks it, typed disarm restores it, and no production test marker remains.

metadata.source: Operator incident and live audit on 2026-07-14
root_cause: generic create therefore reached the canonical kill-switch path
the blanket mutation guard blocks the marker's own cleanup path
the T030 denial proof used production state and lacked atomic cleanup
metadata.block_reason: The marker currently blocks Grabowski mutations and deployment. The central source file is also leased by chatgpt-workspace-lifecycle-cleanup-v1-20260714; no override, reset or concurrent write is allowed.
unblock_conditions: run the exact hash-bound reversible break-glass helper as desktop user
verify kill_switch_engaged is false and audit/recovery/deployment remain valid
wait for or coordinate a clean release of the exact src/grabowski_mcp.py lease
acquire a new isolated worktree and exact path claims
does_not_establish: permission to clear a different marker
permission to bypass environment kill switch
permission to modify foreign worktrees or leases
